name: Minecraft MCP Server
what_it_does: Minecraft MCP Server is an MCP server that connects Claude Desktop to a Minecraft Java Edition world via the Mineflayer API, enabling AI-driven control of a Minecraft bot for building, exploration, inventory management, and in-game communication through natural language.
use_cases: AI-assisted Minecraft structure building by describing or uploading images of what to build
Autonomous resource gathering, crafting, and world exploration directed through conversational prompts
Experimenting with embodied AI agents in a sandboxed Minecraft environment for research or education
not_for: Production or business automation workflows unrelated to Minecraft
Users who need server-side plugins or modded Minecraft compatibility beyond vanilla Java Edition
best_when: You want to experiment with AI-controlled agents in Minecraft using Claude Desktop, particularly for creative building tasks or exploring embodied AI interactions in a game environment.
avoid_when: You are building general-purpose agent infrastructure, need multiplayer server support beyond LAN, or require compatibility with Bedrock Edition.

auth.notes: No network authentication. Configuration via claude_desktop_config.json with hostname and port parameters. Requires LAN-enabled Minecraft world with no external auth.

pricing.notes: Apache-2.0 licensed. Requires a licensed copy of Minecraft Java Edition (user-supplied).

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Game-world errors (block not found, entity out of range) may not produce structured MCP error responses.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Game-world state mutations (placing/mining blocks, movement) are not idempotent by nature.
known_agent_gotchas: Requires Minecraft Java Edition with a single-player world running in LAN mode; server must be manually started each session
Tested on 1.21.8; compatibility with other versions up to 1.21.11 is noted but not guaranteed for all features
Bot actions execute in real game time; AI commands may time out or produce unexpected results if the game world state changes unexpectedly
No persistence between sessions; bot state resets each time the MCP server restarts
